name: sheetsdata
description: Electronic component datasheets for AI agents — specs, pinouts, package data on demand. No PDFs required.
long_description:
SheetsData gives AI agents instant, structured access to electronic component data. One tool call returns the pinout. Another returns electrical specs. No PDFs. No uploads. No context window stuffing.

This bundle proxies stdio↔Streamable HTTP so that Claude Desktop (and any MCP client that only speaks stdio) can connect to the hosted SheetsData MCP server at https://mcp.sheetsdata.com/mcp.

api_key.title: API Key (optional)
api_key.description: Paste an API key from https://sheetsdata.com/dashboard/keys for direct access. Leave blank to use OAuth — a browser tab opens the first time the server runs and stores the token locally.

tools.name: search_parts
tools.description: Search for electronic components by part number or keyword across multiple distributors. Returns merged results with pricing and stock.

tools.name: search_datasheets
tools.description: Semantic search across all extracted datasheets using natural language queries.

tools.name: prefetch_datasheets
tools.description: Batch warm-up extraction for up to 20 parts. Fire-and-forget to reduce wait times.

tools.name: check_extraction_status
tools.description: Poll extraction progress after prefetch or read_datasheet.

tools.name: get_part_details
tools.description: Full component details by MPN — pricing, stock, parameters from all providers.

tools.name: read_datasheet
tools.description: Extract structured datasheet sections (summary, pinout, electrical, package) or semantic search within a datasheet.

tools.name: compare_parts
tools.description: Compare 2-5 parts side by side with merged provider data.

tools.name: check_design_fit
tools.description: Validate a part against operating conditions. Returns PASS/FAIL/WARNING per parameter.

tools.name: find_alternative
tools.description: Find alternative/substitute components with similar specs, same package, or compatible pinout.

tools.name: analyze_image
tools.description: Vision AI analysis of datasheet images — graphs, package drawings, pin diagrams.

tools.name: request_datasheet_upload
tools.description: Request a signed URL to upload a datasheet PDF when datasheet_status is 'no_source' or 'unsupported'.

tools.name: confirm_datasheet_upload
tools.description: Confirm a datasheet upload started via request_datasheet_upload. Verifies SHA-256 + PDF validity + MPN on first page, then charges the upload fee and queues extraction.

prompts.name: component-selection
prompts.description: Walk through selecting a component: define requirements, search candidates, compare specs, validate design fit.

prompts.name: bom-review
prompts.description: Review a bill of materials: look up each part, check stock and lifecycle, flag risks, suggest alternatives.

prompts.name: datasheet-deep-dive
prompts.description: Deep-dive into a specific part: summarize, extract pinout, electrical specs, absolute max ratings, and application circuit.

prompts.name: design-validation
prompts.description: Validate a design: check each component against operating conditions, flag out-of-spec parameters.

prompts.name: second-source
prompts.description: Find second-source alternatives for a part: match package, specs, and availability across providers.

prompts.name: interface-check
prompts.description: Check electrical and protocol compatibility between two ICs on a shared bus (SPI, I2C, UART).

prompts.name: firmware-kickstart
prompts.description: Extract register map, initialization sequence, and protocol details from a peripheral IC datasheet.

prompts.name: thermal-review
prompts.description: Thermal and derating analysis: compare operating conditions against absolute maximum AND recommended limits.
